messages.content: write a song on title tera hua in urdu

(Verse 1)
Khamoshiyon mein tu hi shor hai
Mere jeene ka tu hi zor hai
Chandni raaton mein tu aur hai
Dil ki gehraiyon mein shumar hai
Aankhon mein tu, khwabon mein tu
Teri yaadon ke gulzar hai

(Chorus)
Tera hua, main toh ho gaya tera hua
Tujhse juda, ab na kabhi hona chahta
Tera hua, yeh dil bhi hai tera hua
Meri dua, sirf tu hi rehna chahta

(Verse 2)
Aasmanon se aaya farishta
Mere ruh ka ban gaya rishta
Har saans mein teri baat chhupi
Dil ke raaste pe teri chaap si
Jismo jaan mein gholta jaaun
Tu jo kahe woh main kar jaaun

(Chorus)
Tera hua, har lamha sirf tera hua
Kehta raha, mera ishq teri ibadat
Tera hua, ye jahan bhi tera hua
Meri khata, ho gayi jo bhi, mujhko maaf kar

(Bridge)
Teri baahon ka ghera, yeh safar na ho tera
Mere har ek sahera, teri rahguzar hai
Tere bina hoon adhoora, tera pyaar hai qubool
Meri kismat ka noor hai, tera intezar hai

(Chorus)
Tera hua, teri aankhon mein basa hua
Mere toh khuda, tu hi hai, mujhpe vaar diya
Tera hua, hawaon mein, ghataon mein tu
Teri raza, meri dhadkanein, tujhse hai judi

(Outro)
Tera hua, rab se zyada tujhe mana hua
Main rahoon sada, tere saath nibhata jaaun
Tera hua, ab khud se bhi zyada tera hua
Meri wafa, teri raah mein likhta chala jaaun
write a song on title tera hua 2 in urdu

(Verse 1)
Chupke se aaya, dil mein samaya
Hai tu hi wajah, meri saanson ka aana jana
Neendon mein, khwaabon mein, baaton mein tu
Har pal, har ghadi, shamil hai tu

(Chorus)
Tera hua 2, dobara main tera hua 2
Phir se teri raahon mein khoya hua
Tera hua 2, har saaz pe tera hua 2
Teri dhun mein, dil hai mera goonja hua

(Verse 2)
Labzon mein teri baatein sari
Aankhon se pehchaan loon tumhari
Teri hansi, teri inayat
Har dua mein shamil teri hayat

(Chorus)
Tera hua 2, dobara tera tere bina 2
Na jiya, teri justaju har ghadi
Tera hua 2, iss dil ko tu mila 2
Tere ishq mein, main toh ho gaya sab kuch bhula

(Bridge)
Raahon mein teri, surkh hai shafaq
Main dekhoon tujhe, na ho koi fasl
Mere liye, saari duniya bekhabar
Jab se hua, tujhse ye pyaar ka iqraar

(Chorus)
Tera hua 2, lafzon mein na byan hua 2
Teri ulfat mein, hai dil bechain yeh bata
Tera hua 2, mere khuda se tera hua 2
Jo tujhse ho juda, wo lamha nahi kabul mujhe

(Outro)
Tere ishq ka, hai ye asar
Ab mujh mein nahin, koi inkaar
Har saans yeh kehti, tu meri dhadkan
Tera hua 2, tera hua 2, kabhi na ho kam
write a song on title phir se in urdu

(Verse 1)
Yaadon ka ye kaarvan, phir se chala hai
Umeedon ke diye se, dil jala hai
Bikhar ke bhi sambhle, toot kar bhi chale
Manzilein pukarti hain, hum ko phir se

(Chorus)
Phir se, aao na, khwaab bun lein phir se
Raaston pe chal padein, dost ban ke phir se
Phir se, dil mein ho, pyaar waali hulchul phir se
Har gham ko bhool jaayein, muskurayein phir se

(Verse 2)
Baarishon ki rimjhim me, saath hum chalein phir se
Bheegi mitti ki khushboo, saans loon main phir se
Dil ke rishte na toote, yeh dua hai har baar
Haathon mein haath liye, chale saath hum phir se

(Chorus)
Phir se, sapno ko, aasmaan pe saja dein phir se
Kho jaayein uss chandni me, baatein karein phir se
Phir se, woh lamhe, jeene ka Karar dein phir se
Har pal ko gale lagayein, jeeyein zindagi phir se

(Bridge)
Bahas purani chhodo, manzil pe nazar hai
Mohabbat ki kahani likhein hum phir se
Naye suraj ke saath, nayi subah ki baat
Khuda se fariyaad hai, mile khushiyan phir se

(Chorus)
Phir se, baandh loon, toota taara haathon mein phir se
Hasraton ke khaab saje hain, in aankhon mein phir se
Phir se, beete hue, pal ko zinda karein phir se
Hawaon mein hai gwahi, jeetenge hum phir se

(Outro)
Toot kar, bikhar kar, hum jud jaayein phir se
Har raste pe tum mere, saathi banogi phir se
Phir se, chhoo loon main, aasman ko phir se
Main hoon, tu hai, hum honge phir se
write a song on title kabhi to in urdu

(Verse 1)
Chaand raat sa nikhar ja
Meri zaat pe bikhar ja
Kabhi to, milne ka wada kar de
Meri raahon mein tu bhi dhal ja

(Chorus)
Kabhi to, meri khamoshi sun le
Dil ke jazbaat sun le, kabhi to
Kabhi to, mere sapne bun le
Aankhon mein tu bhi bas le, kabhi to

(Verse 2)
Dekha hai tujhe chaandni mein
Khoya raha teri yaadon mein
Kabhi to, haqeeqat ban ke aa
Kabhi to, baaton mein raaz khol de

(Chorus)
Kabhi to, meri uljhan suljha de
Dil se dil ka raabta jod de, kabhi to
Kabhi to, waqt ko tham le
Saath mere yeh kadam badha de, kabhi to

(Bridge)
Khawabon ki tarah, pal mein na toot ja
Meri pyari duniya mein, tu bhi kho ja
Kabhi to, mujh mein tu sama ja
Justaju hai, teri yeh aarzoo hai

(Chorus)
Kabhi to, meri hansi bun ja
In labon pe bas tu hi reh ja, kabhi to
Kabhi to, mohabbat karle
Dil ke iss mausam mein beh ja, kabhi to

(Outro)
Kabhi to, meri baahon mein aa
Zindagi se phir na ja, kabhi to
Kabhi to, ikraar kar de
Meri rooh mein tu utar ja, kabhi to
write a song on title bewajah in urdu

(Verse 1)
Kaise kahoon main iss baat ko
Ke tu mera hai bewajah
Chaahat mein teri, baaton mein teri
Yeh dil roya hai bewajah

(Chorus)
Bewajah, na jane kyun, teri ho gaya bewajah
Tere bin, ye raatein teri, ho gayin tanha bewajah
Bewajah, tera intezaar, karta hoon bewajah
Khoya hoon, tere khayalon mein, mein yahan bewajah

(Verse 2)
Teri yaadon se guzarta hoon
Teri aarzoon se lipat ja
Aankhon ko bhi, raah dikhti nahi
Tujhse judaa kab hua bewajah

(Chorus)
Bewajah, tujhse meri, har mulakat bewajah
Tere bina mere, dil ka jahan, hai suna bewajah
Bewajah, bhatka yeh dil, hai tera bewajah
Dil ke iss mod par, tu hai kyun nahi bewajah

(Bridge)
Lamhein chu kar guzar jaate hain
Teri dhadkanon se rishta jod jaate hain
Bewajah, kyun yeh dooriyaan
Har pal tera, ehsaas hai yahan

(Chorus)
Bewajah, mujhse kabhi, na rahna juda bewajah
Tera hoon, teri rahon mein, khada hoon bewajah
Bewajah, kis liye tu, aaj hai khafa bewajah
Teri khamoshi se, mere hothon pe, hai fariyaad bewajah

(Outro)
Kareeb aaj tu, paas aane de
Bewajah na mujhko, tu tadpane de
Bewajah, pyaar tera, maang raha hoon bewajah
Tere liye meri duniya, bichha raha hoon bewajah
some song title ideas in urdu about love

1. Ishq Ki Baarish (Love's Rain)
2. Dil Ki Dastaan (The Tale of The Heart)
3. Pyaar Ka Safar (Journey of Love)
4. Teri Meri Kahani (Your and My Story)
5. Mohabbat Ke Rang (Colors of Love)
6. Tere Bina Jeena (Living Without You)
7. Aashiqui Ka Asar (The Effect of Love)
8. Chaand Ki Kasam (Moon's Promise)
9. Mein Rab Se Teri (I Ask For You From God)
10. Dil Se Tera Naam (Your Name From the Heart)
11. Mehsoos Ho Tum (You Are Felt)
12. Ishq Ki Inteha (The Limit of Love)
13. Pyaar Ki Pehli Baarish (First Rain of Love)
14. Bechain Dil (Restless Heart)
15. Aankhon Ke Ishaare (Signals from the Eyes)
16. Khwabon Ki Zameen (Land of Dreams)
17. Jazbaat Ka Samundar (Ocean of Emotions)
18. Tere Naam Ki Lagan (Devotion to Your Name)
19. Mausam-e-Ishq (Weather of Love)
20. Teri Yaadon Mein (In Your Memories)
21. Humsafar Toh Hai (You Are My Companion)
22. Do Dil Ek Jaan (Two Hearts, One Soul)
23. Tu Hi Meri Manzil (You Are My Destination)
24. Meri Zindagi, Tera Pyaar (My Life, Your Love)
25. Tere Ishq Mein Khoye (Lost in Your Love)
write a urdu song on title Teri Meri Kahani

(Verse 1)
Teri meri, ye kahani
Rang laayi hai pyaar ki nishani
Lamha lamha, teri baatein
Yaadon mein basi, teri saugaatein

(Chorus)
Teri meri kahani, hai ban gayi fasaani
Ishq ke iss safar mein, tu mili toh jeet gaye zindagi
Teri meri kahani, hai dhadkanon ki zubaani
Aankhein milin jab baari, toh likhi gayi ek nayi kahani

(Verse 2)
Tere bina, sab suna hai
Tujhse hi, har khushi ka khazana hai
Raahatein teri, saaya tera
Har pal mein tu, mujhmein basa tera

(Chorus)
Teri meri kahani, hai bahaar tu, paani main
Tu jo sang chale, toh bane har rasta divani
Teri meri kahani, hai noor hai tu, main jaani
Do jahan mein hai goonji, teri meri prem kahaani

(Bridge)
Dil ki yeh duaa hai, tu saath ho
Har janam mein, bas tu hi toh
Har ghadi, har disha mein
Teri meri kahani shor machaaye re

(Chorus)
Teri meri kahani, hai adhoori jo bina teri
Saathi tu mera, tera saath ho, toh hai puri
Teri meri kahani, hai mere labon pe jo chhayi
Dil se dil tak jo gayi, teri meri apni kahani

(Outro)
Teri meri, teri meri, teri meri kahani
Hai yeh jashan e mohabbat, ki sabse pyaari rut hai aani
Teri meri kahani, rahe yun hi anjaani
Pyar ki is duniya mein, teri meri hi toh kahani
write a urdu song on title Dil Se Tera Naam

(Verse 1)
Dil se tera naam pukaarta raha
Chandni raaton mein teri yaad aati raha
Dhadkanon ne har pal tujhe hi toh chaha
Teri oor khicha chala aata raha

(Chorus)
Dil se tera naam, dil se tera naam
Labb par aake ruk jaaye, anjaan si koi daastan
Dil se tera naam, dil se tera naam
Rooh tak ja pohonch jaaye, ishq ka yeh arzaan

(Verse 2)
Sitaron se jaise tu baat kare
Meri neend mein teri khushboo chhaa jaaye
Aasmaan se jo tere khwaab barse
Har ek boond mein mujhe tu nazar aaye

(Chorus)
Dil se tera naam, dil se tera naam
Khwaabon mein bhi tu sajde, mera mann yeh karta jaaye
Dil se tera naam, dil se tera naam
Behki behki si raahon mein, tera saath yun hi paaye

(Bridge)
Tere ishq ka ye junoon hai kaisa
Meri har dua mein bas tera hi faisla
Teri har nazar, mere liye hai ibadat
Dil se tera naam, hai mujhmein samaat

(Chorus)
Dil se tera naam, dil se tera naam
Jab jab bhi main jeeyun, teri chahat ko paaya main
Dil se tera naam, dil se tera naam
Mere honthon pe hai aake, tera hi toh saaya main

(Outro)
Dil se tera naam, dil se tera naam
Sadaa mere labon pe, teri baatein sambhaalun main
Dil se tera naam, dil se tera naam
Tera hi toh asar hai, tere ishq mein ubaalun main
write a urdu song on title Tu Hai Kahan

(Verse 1)
Raahon mein khade hain hum, nigaahen pehchan ki talash mein
Dil kehta hai har ghadi, tu kahin hai pass mein
Aaj bhi teri kami, ko mehsoos karta hoon
Sab ke darmiyan main akela, teri raah takta hoon

(Chorus)
Tu hai kahan, mere sawalon ka jawab bata de
Dhoondha tujhe har jagah, teri yaadon mein khoya hoon
Tu hai kahan, meri tanhai mein shaamil ho jaa zara
Tere bina jeene ka haseen, koi khwaab nahi

(Verse 2)
Chaand ko bhi tanha dekha, toh tera aks paaya
Har sitare se poocha, teri khabar laaya
Har saans yeh kehti, tu meri kainaat hai
Har rang mein tu chhupa, tu hi meri zaat hai

(Chorus)
Tu hai kahan, mere armaanon ki basti mein aaja
Dil ke sheher mein bas ja, mujhko kar de sabse wafa
Tu hai kahan, meri duaon ka asar ho jaa zara
Tere bina rangon mein, koi rang nahi sajta

(Bridge)
Subah se le kar raat tak, teri yaadein saath hai
Tujhse juda karke, lamha lamha maat hai
Khoje tujhe ye nazar, har ghadi har baat mein
Tu hai kahan mere Humsafar, mere khwabon ki baraat mein

(Chorus)
Tu hai kahan, meri baaton mein, meri yaadon mein bas ja
Dil ke inn panahon mein, tu hi tu ab raajaa
Tu hai kahan, teri duniya ab yehi hai sambhal zara
Tere bina safar ka, koi maza nahi aata

(Outro)
Tu hai kahan, sunle pukar, ye hawa bhi hai bezaar
Dil se nikle aawaaz, tere naam se abaad
Tu hai kahan, mujhko bata de, tera pata ab aa jaa
Tera intezaar hai mujhko, tu hai kahan, mujhko bata…
